question_pt: Quais capitulos CID concentraram mais internacoes?
sql: SELECT c.DS_CAPITULO, COUNT(*) AS internacoes FROM internacoes i JOIN cid c ON i.DIAG_PRINC = c.CID GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY internacoes DESC LIMIT 20
